name: Antipasto Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss together cauliflower, carrots, green pepper, and olives.
2. Cook rotini in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender but firm, about 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse the pasta in cold water.
3. To make the dressing, combine oil, vinegar, garlic, and sugar in a bowl. Add salt and pepper to taste; mix well.
4. Pour all but 1/3 cup of dressing over the salad, tossing to coat evenly.
5. Reserve the remaining dressing.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight.
7. Just before serving, taste the salad and adjust seasonings as needed. If necessary, add the remaining dressing and toss again.
